name: Magical Hound
desc: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can target 1 face-up Spell/Trap your opponent controls; return it to the hand, and if you do, Special Summon this card. You can only use this effect of "Magical Hound" once per Duel.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can target 1 face-up Spell/Trap your opponent controls; return it to the hand, and if you do, Special Summon this card. You can only use this effect of "Magical Hound" once per Duel.
eff: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can target 1 face-up Spell/Trap your opponent controls; return it to the hand, and if you do, Special Summon this card. You can only use this effect of "Magical Hound" once per Duel.

mst: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
